title: vicia lentoides
intro: Vicia lentoides, also known as the lentil vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its high tannin content. The health benefits of Vicia lentoides include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe irritated skin and wounds. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used to make a poultice to aid in the healing process.
